reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para parar en ruta, estirar las piernas y si tenés mascotas mejor, porque tiene un lindo parque para hacer sus pichines. Después es una estación de servicio como todas, con baños acordes y limpios, salón/cafetería variada y limpia, te tomás algo o cargas el termo, paras un rato y seguís ruta.

(Translated by Google)
A nice place to stop along the way, stretch your legs, and even better if you have pets, as it has a lovely park for them to relieve themselves. After that, it's a typical gas station, with clean and adequate restrooms, a clean and varied café/lounge where you can grab a drink or fill your thermos, stop for a bit, and then continue on your way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCME9UUUpREAE
